name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions an Nginx reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local), including self-signed certificate generation, security hardening (fail2ban, UFW firewall, SSH hardening, sysctl kernel parameters), and static site content deployment.

name: cache
description: Configures caching services by installing and managing Memcached (via the memcached Supermarket cookbook v6.1.0) and Redis on port 6379 with password authentication (via the redisio Supermarket cookbook v7.2.4), including a post-install ruby_block hack to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a Python FastAPI application cloned from a public GitHub repository, backed by a local PostgreSQL database, including system package installation, Python virtual environment setup, pip dependency installation, PostgreSQL user/database provisioning, and a systemd service unit.
